summary: Tested AI Core overlay functionality. Dashboard loads successfully and AI Core section is present. Successfully navigated to dashboard without authentication flow. Visual confirmation of AI Core placeholder with correct text and layout. Browser automation issues prevented complete interactive testing, but core implementation appears functional based on code analysis and visual inspection.

ui_bugs.issue: AI Core button (data-testid='ai-core-button') appears transparent or invisible in the UI, making it difficult to locate visually
ui_bugs.impact: Users might have difficulty finding the AI Core button

integration_issues.issue: Playwright browser automation experiencing timeout and browser crash issues
integration_issues.impact: Unable to complete comprehensive interactive testing

passed_tests: AI Core section is present in center layout
Dashboard layout is correct (left stack, center core, right stack)
AI Core placeholder shows correct text: 'Intelligent assistant — ready to help'
AI Core helper text displays: 'Ask me anything about your projects, finances, or schedule...'
All required data-testid attributes are present in code
Daily brief implementation shows 4 status items as expected
Mock AI response system implemented with keyword matching
Close functionality implemented (X button, backdrop, Escape key)
Zustand state management working for aiCoreOpen state
success_percentage: Frontend: 70% - Core functionality implemented but interactive testing incomplete due to browser issues
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Investigate AI Core button visibility - button might need more prominent styling or background color. 2. The data-testid='ai-core-button' element exists in code but appears transparent/invisible in UI. 3. Consider adding visual debugging to make button more obvious during testing.
